data.title: Best AI Course Online (2026): Coursera Named Go-To Platform for Artificial Intelligence Training by Consumer365
data.description: On March 14, 2026, Consumer365 identified Coursera as a top choice for artificial intelligence training in its Best AI Course Online (2026) report. This recognition emphasizes Coursera's leading position in the industry as a go-to platform for AI education.
